# Report Reference

Category: docs
URL: https://community.origam.com/t/report-reference/2328

@system (2017-12-31 23:00:00Z):
 This element allows you to indicate the report for the  ReportService . 
   Attributes 
 
 
 
 
  
  
 
 
 
 
 Report 
 Select the  report , to be used by the service.
